channel.title: it's giving news
channel.description: wake up to james and anne word-vomiting the news. like a disheveled little wobbly hog sprinting to the trough, come on down, lil piggie. your daily hot and messy ai slop is served... enjoy ✨
channel.itunes:author: Reid McGill
channel.itunes:summary: wake up to james and anne word-vomiting the news. your daily hot and messy ai slop, served. ✨
channel.itunes:subtitle: A sharp morning briefing with James and Anne.

item.title: TSMC Moves the Bottleneck to Chiayi
item.description: The most expensive AI chips in the world can be finished and still stuck waiting for the final package. That factory bottleneck moved one step down the line.
item.itunes:summary: The most expensive AI chips in the world can be finished and still stuck waiting for the final package. That factory bottleneck moved one step down the line.
item.content:encoded: The most expensive AI chips in the world can be finished and still stuck waiting for the final package. That factory bottleneck moved one step down the line.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Iran Closes the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Here's what's moving: Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz and is saying any unauthorized vessel that crosses is getting hit, that's going to hit your gas tank first. Inflation just printed four point two percent, the hottest since twenty twenty-three, on a forty-percent gas surge, and Disney's...
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz and is saying any unauthorized vessel that crosses is getting hit, that's going to hit your gas tank first. Inflation just printed four point two percent, the hottest since twenty twenty-three, on a forty-percent gas surge, and Disney's...
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz and is saying any unauthorized vessel that crosses is getting hit, that's going to hit your gas tank first. Inflation just printed four point two percent, the hottest since twenty twenty-three, on a forty-percent gas surge, and Disney's...
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Oregon Drops Delay Motion on Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger
item.description: Here's what's moving: Oregon just dropped its delay motion on the Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger, no more blocking the deal, and S-K Hynix popped thirteen percent on its Nasdaq debut, twenty-six and a half billion dollars raised, bigger than Alibaba's 2014 listing.
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: Oregon just dropped its delay motion on the Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger, no more blocking the deal, and S-K Hynix popped thirteen percent on its Nasdaq debut, twenty-six and a half billion dollars raised, bigger than Alibaba's 2014 listing.
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: Oregon just dropped its delay motion on the Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger, no more blocking the deal, and S-K Hynix popped thirteen percent on its Nasdaq debut, twenty-six and a half billion dollars raised, bigger than Alibaba's 2014 listing.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Campaign Favors Disproportionate Support Over Economic Reality
item.description: Here's what's moving: SK Hynix priced a twenty-six-point-five billion dollar Nasdaq listing, biggest foreign debut in US history, seven times oversubscribed. The Commanders are hanging John Riggins' forty-four in the rafters, more than forty years late.
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: SK Hynix priced a twenty-six-point-five billion dollar Nasdaq listing, biggest foreign debut in US history, seven times oversubscribed. The Commanders are hanging John Riggins' forty-four in the rafters, more than forty years late.
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: SK Hynix priced a twenty-six-point-five billion dollar Nasdaq listing, biggest foreign debut in US history, seven times oversubscribed. The Commanders are hanging John Riggins' forty-four in the rafters, more than forty years late.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Candidate leads KOSPI -5% and Norm Ai nabs $120M.
item.description: Here's what's moving: South Korea's KOSPI just got crushed five percent in a session, dragged down by Samsung after the chipmaker printed a nineteen-fold jump in quarterly profit and the market sold it anyway. Stop on the Samsung thing for a second.
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: South Korea's KOSPI just got crushed five percent in a session, dragged down by Samsung after the chipmaker printed a nineteen-fold jump in quarterly profit and the market sold it anyway. Stop on the Samsung thing for a second.
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: South Korea's KOSPI just got crushed five percent in a session, dragged down by Samsung after the chipmaker printed a nineteen-fold jump in quarterly profit and the market sold it anyway. Stop on the Samsung thing for a second.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: AI Jobs Fight Goes Public
item.description: Here's what's moving: Walmart just got a "patriotic" badge from the President for cutting the price of ground beef, which means grocery store pricing is now a foreign-policy lever, and A ten-billion-dollar pharma deal that closed at a hundred-and-two-percent premium and somehow made everyone's...
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: Walmart just got a "patriotic" badge from the President for cutting the price of ground beef, which means grocery store pricing is now a foreign-policy lever, and A ten-billion-dollar pharma deal that closed at a hundred-and-two-percent premium and somehow made everyone's...
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: Walmart just got a "patriotic" badge from the President for cutting the price of ground beef, which means grocery store pricing is now a foreign-policy lever, and A ten-billion-dollar pharma deal that closed at a hundred-and-two-percent premium and somehow made everyone's...
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Snowflake Gets The AWS Rocket
item.description: Here's what's moving: Samsung is on track for an eighteen-fold jump in profit on AI memory demand, with SK Hynix pricing a twenty-eight billion dollar U.S. Listing to ride the same wave, and Rate-hike fears ease and U.S.
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: Samsung is on track for an eighteen-fold jump in profit on AI memory demand, with SK Hynix pricing a twenty-eight billion dollar U.S. Listing to ride the same wave, and Rate-hike fears ease and U.S.
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: Samsung is on track for an eighteen-fold jump in profit on AI memory demand, with SK Hynix pricing a twenty-eight billion dollar U.S. Listing to ride the same wave, and Rate-hike fears ease and U.S.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Candidate leads shift on Alibaba AI framework
item.description: Here's what's moving: Alibaba just dropped an AI agent framework that cuts token use by ninety-nine percent, ninety-nine percent, the resource every model chews through going from a Costco run down to a receipt. When input cost drops that hard, the infra layer gets to feel what disruption...
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: Alibaba just dropped an AI agent framework that cuts token use by ninety-nine percent, ninety-nine percent, the resource every model chews through going from a Costco run down to a receipt. When input cost drops that hard, the infra layer gets to feel what disruption...
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: Alibaba just dropped an AI agent framework that cuts token use by ninety-nine percent, ninety-nine percent, the resource every model chews through going from a Costco run down to a receipt. When input cost drops that hard, the infra layer gets to feel what disruption...
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Agents Enter The Morning
item.description: Here's what's moving: the Dow just printed a record close heading into the holiday with AI names snapping back. Shutting down recently with multiple attendees on life support in extreme heat.
item.itunes:summary: Here's what's moving: the Dow just printed a record close heading into the holiday with AI names snapping back. Shutting down recently with multiple attendees on life support in extreme heat.
item.content:encoded: Here's what's moving: the Dow just printed a record close heading into the holiday with AI names snapping back. Shutting down recently with multiple attendees on life support in extreme heat.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill

item.title: Gold Rips While AI Migrates Java
item.description: Gold Rips While AI Migrates Java. A short look at the main update, what changed, and why it matters.
item.itunes:summary: Gold Rips While AI Migrates Java. A short look at the main update, what changed, and why it matters.
item.content:encoded: Gold Rips While AI Migrates Java. A short look at the main update, what changed, and why it matters.
item.itunes:author: Reid McGill
